subject: Swift UVOT Calibration Documentation
body:
P. Roming, C. Gronwall (PSU), A. Breeveld, T. S. Poole, A. Blustin 
(UCL-MSSL), & P. Boyd (GSFC-UMBC) on behalf of the Swift UVOT team report:

The calibration documentation for the Swift UVOT is now available at the 
following site:

http://swift.gsfc.nasa.gov/docs/heasarc/caldb/swift/docs/uvot/index.html
